mapper.select: SELECT sr.response_id as responseId , sr.score_value as scoreValue , sr.text_value as textValue , DATE_FORMAT(sr.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as createdAt , sr.survey_id as surveyId , sr.question_id as questionId , sr.course_id as courseId , sr.loginID as loginId FROM survey_response sr WHERE sr.response_id = #{responseId}

SELECT sq.question_id as questionId, sq.content as questionContent, sq.type as questionType, sq.order as questionOrder, COUNT(DISTINCT sr.loginID) as responseCount, ROUND(AVG(sr.score_value), 2) as avgScore, SUM(CASE WHEN sr.score_value = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as score5Count, SUM(CASE WHEN sr.score_value = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as score4Count, SUM(CASE WHEN sr.score_value = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as score3Count, SUM(CASE WHEN sr.score_value = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as score2Count, SUM(CASE WHEN sr.score_value = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as score1Count FROM survey_question sq LEFT JOIN survey_response sr ON sq.question_id = sr.question_id WHERE sq.survey_id = #{surveyId} GROUP BY sq.question_id, sq.content, sq.type, sq.order ORDER BY sq.order

SELECT sr.response_id as responseId, sr.text_value as textValue, DATE_FORMAT(sr.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt, sr.loginID as loginId, u.name as userName FROM survey_response sr LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo u ON sr.loginID = u.loginID WHERE sr.question_id = #{questionId} AND sr.text_value IS NOT NULL AND sr.text_value != '' ORDER BY sr.created_at DESC

SELECT sr.response_id as responseId, sr.survey_id as surveyId, sr.question_id as questionId, sr.score_value as scoreValue, sr.text_value as textValue, DATE_FORMAT(sr.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt, sr.loginID as loginId, u.name as userName, sq.content as questionContent, sq.type as questionType, sq.order as questionOrder FROM survey_response sr LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo u ON sr.loginID = u.loginID LEFT JOIN survey_question sq ON sr.question_id = sq.question_id WHERE sr.survey_id = #{surveyId} ORDER BY sr.loginID, sq.order
